article_title: Rhetorical Moves and the Ethics of Persuasive Story
persuasion_context: nonprofit appeal using beneficiary testimony scarcity cues and social proof

review.governance_note: High-priority persuasive story governance review required. Rhetorical integrity is limited. Strengthen evidence, proportionality, context, dignity, agency, and transparency. Manipulation risk is elevated. Review fear, emotional exploitation, context omission, social proof, urgency, and judgment review. Audience agency is limited. Improve claim clarity, uncertainty disclosure, tradeoff openness, evidence visibility, optionality, and question space. Platform persuasion risk is elevated. Review amplification, microtargeting, context collapse, sponsorship clarity, and social proof. Escalate. Urgent emotional appeal risks consent weakness, dignity loss, pressure, and weak audience agency.
